llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Selected gpt_plus_overview over gpt_only because it represents the most capable condition (GPT-4 with additional prompt engineering training), and it shows a larger effect (1.48 vs 1.31 point increase).
llm_extracted.notes: Sample sizes are not reported in the arms array (all n=null). Means are partially available: control mean is 4.375, and AI mean is inferred as 4.375 + 1.482 = 5.857 (rounded to 5.855 based on effect). Standard deviations are not reported. Only regression coefficients with standard errors are available. P-value reported as inequality 'p < 0.001' rather than exact value. This is a between-subjects design with three independent groups. Without SDs or sample sizes, effect size calculation will be severely limited.
source_quotes: In column (1) in Table 4, GPT + overview leads to a 1.48 increase in scores over the control mean of 4.37, representing a 33.9% increase
with GPT only producing a 1.31 (or 29.9%) increase
